name: Golfixx
about: Golfixx is an indoor golf training studio and simulator facility located in Oakley, California. It specializes in providing quality instruction using TrackMan technology combined with over 30 years of teaching experience from its lead instructor, Dane Judson. The facility features two 630 square foot rooms, primarily serving as a space for golfers of all abilities to receive lessons, practice, and play on virtual courses. Golfixx operates with a focus on technology-driven improvement, offering both individual coaching and simulator rental opportunities for players looking to refine their skills without weather constraints.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to TrackMan technology for instant feedback and data analysis
Ability to play world-famous golf courses in a controlled environment
No weather-related interruptions to practice or play
Opportunity for personalized coaching with over 30 years of experience
Intimate, distraction-free setting focused on improvement

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service provided. BYOB is not mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary simulator used for lessons and play. Facility also mentions using TrackMan 4.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You are encouraged to bring your favorite clubs. Golfixx supplies balls and clubs, but no left-handed clubs are available at this time.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information on food or drink policies is provided on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, an 18-hole round should take one hour per player. For a twosome, it takes 2 hours; for three players, 3 hours, etc. Simulator rental is strictly reserved by the hour, not by the number of holes played.

faq.question: Is Golfixx kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is kid-friendly. The owner, Dane Judson, has a long history of teaching juniors and hosting junior camps, with several students going on to play college golf.
